description: You are the store administrator for Urban Electronics (http://localhost, admin / Admin1234!). A customer, John Doe (username: johndoe), has requested to cancel his recent order for an Apple MacBook Air M2 and a Keychron Q1 Pro ($1,298.00 total) in exchange for store credit. Cancel this order and issue the credit by creating an active, store-assigned promotion named 'Store Credit - John Doe Refund'. The promotion should be a fixed dollar amount of $1,298.00 and require a coupon with the code 'REFUND-JOHNDOE' with a usage limit of 1.
